title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 09 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/09/2024
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated upward, with the most-traded contract 2501 closing at 685 yuan, up 0.44% throughout the day. Steel mills were cautious and mainly restocked as needed. Today's market trading atmosphere was average.
